content: DeviceMotionEvent: iOS 13+ requires explicit permission via DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission() called from user gesture. Android Chrome does not require permission. Sampling rate: historically ~60Hz on most devices, some report up to 100Hz. Rate is OS-controlled and not configurable from JS. interval property on the event reports actual rate. iOS Safari caps at 60Hz, Android Chrome can reach 100Hz on some devices.
